pm_decision_extract.decision_or_assessment: Surge-short entry decision for STSS: extreme price deterioration with structural absence of corroborating catalyst evidence relative to sector expectations.
evidence_used: sentiment_community_ownership_evidence: analyst_ratings stale (1 Buy since May 2024)
evidence_missing: Fundamental financial data (income_statement, balance_sheet, cash_flow all null)
Recent analyst consensus or upgrade catalyst (fmp_sentiment shows only 1 Buy, unchanged since May 2024)
pm_decision_extract.reasoning_summary: STSS exhibits catastrophic price deterioration (5d: -52.86%, 20d: -95.31%, 60d: -99.31%) with elevated relative volume (1.43x 20d avg). The surge narrative (intraday +55% on 2025-04-10) is NOT corroborated by observable evidence. STRUCTURAL ABSENCE PATTERN: (1) Zero news items in 7-day window (polygon_news returned 0 rows; 20 items dropped post-cutoff); (2) No SEC 8-K filing confirmation; (3) Analyst ratings frozen at 1 Buy since May 2024; (4) Most recent earnings (2025-03-27) showed EPS -869.7 vs estimate -198 (massive miss), but no news corroboration; (5) Wikipedia pageviews show baseline attention (14-35 views/day, peak 35 on 2025-04-07) with no surge pattern; (6) GitHub unmapped (no developer footprint); (7) Information integrity assessment flags low-tier sources only (T3=1, T4=1; no T1/T2 primary confirmation). SECTOR REASONING: STSS ticker maps to 'Space_Tracking_and_Surveillance_System' per Wikipedia article title, suggesting aerospace/defense/space technology sector. For such a company, expected evidence would include regulatory filings (FAA/DoD contracts), technical announcements, partnership disclosures, or earnings guidance. The packet contains NONE of these. The absence of news, filings, and sector-specific corroboration relative to the magnitude of the price move is the bear-thesis signal. FUNDAMENTAL DETERIORATION: Company is deeply unprofitable (net_margin_pct=-11724.3%, ROE=-1.56, ROA=-1.05). Valuation metrics are distorted by negative earnings (PE=-0.167, EV/EBITDA=-0.160). REVERSE SPLIT HISTORY: 1:22 reverse split on 2024-10-16 is a classic distress signal. The surge appears to be momentum/short-squeeze on a distressed, unprofitable micro-cap with no verifiable catalyst. The rapid collapse (-95% in 20 days) is consistent with a momentum trap. PREPONDERANCE OF EVIDENCE: The bear thesis is carried by multiple coherent dimensions: (i) extreme price deterioration with no identified catalyst (structural absence of news/filings); (ii) fundamental deterioration (massive earnings miss, negative profitability); (iii) sector-expected evidence footprint is absent (no regulatory/contract disclosures for aerospace/defense company); (iv) alternative data shows no abnormal attention (Wikipedia pageviews baseline only); (v) reverse-split distress signal; (vi) analyst sentiment frozen and stale. No single dimension is overwhelming, but the SYNTHESIS across all dimensions points strongly to a momentum trap on a distressed micro-cap. Risk agent confirms no hard-veto conditions tripped. Surge-short sleeve agent confirms position sizing at 0.005 (0.5%) is within §4.8 caps. DECISION: SHORT at 0.5% initial position per §4.8 fixed entry sizing.

If fundamental_snapshot is populated with positive revenue growth and path to profitability.
If analyst upgrades from T1/T2 sources appear with detailed thesis.
If alternative_data (GitHub, patent filings, regulatory approvals) shows real operational progress.
If stock stabilizes above 6.00 with sustained volume and positive news flow.

pm_decision_extract.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: The evidence packet correctly flags the absence of news, filings, and fundamental data as data_unavailable / not_evaluated. The packet structure does not explicitly surface the STRUCTURAL ABSENCE PATTERN as a bear-thesis signal, but the prompt correctly instructs the agent to infer from null blocks and zero-row adapters that the absence itself is corroborating evidence (§13.6 SOFT_REASONING, universal-soft-veto principle). A future schema revision could add an explicit 'structural_absence_score' block to quantify the mismatch between expected and observed evidence footprints.

Monitor short-interest and borrow-availability data to assess squeeze risk.
Set alert for bankruptcy/restructuring filings or going-concern warnings in next 10-Q.
pm_decision_extract.reason: STSS surged ~55% intraday on 2025-04-10 but collapsed -95% in 20 days. Structural absence of corroborating evidence (zero news pre-cutoff, no 8-K filing, no analyst upgrade, no GitHub footprint, no fundamental data) relative to sector expectations (space/defense company should have regulatory/contract disclosures) is strong bear-thesis signal. Recent earnings miss (-869.7 EPS vs -198 est), negative profitability metrics, reverse-split history, and low-tier information sources all support short. Alternative data (Wikipedia pageviews) shows no abnormal attention. Momentum trap on distressed micro-cap. Recommend short at 0.5% initial position per §4.8 fixed entry sizing.

narrative_event.reasoning_summary: STSS exhibits catastrophic price deterioration (5d: -52.86%, 20d: -95.31%, 60d: -99.31%) with elevated relative volume (1.43x 20d avg) on decision date 2025-04-10. The price action is extreme and warrants catalyst investigation. However, the evidence packet reveals a STRUCTURAL ABSENCE PATTERN that is itself the primary signal: (1) news_event_summary.status='data_unavailable' with 0 items in the 7-day lookback window and 20 items dropped post-cutoff, indicating news flow existed but is not accessible at decision time; (2) filing_confirmation.status='not_evaluated' with no SEC 8-K confirmation; (3) news_event_summary.catalyst_type=null, catalyst_specificity_score=null, vague_narrative_flag=null — all agent-derived fields marked 'not_evaluated'; (4) alternative_data_features shows wikipedia_pageviews data (30 rows, 2025-03-12 to 2025-04-10, views ranging 14–35, peak 35 on 2025-04-07) but no corroborating news, GitHub activity, or retail attention signals; (5) information_integrity_assessment.status='insufficient_evidence' with corroboration_status='uncorroborated' and use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false (pollution-defense layer unimplemented); (6) sentiment_community_ownership_evidence shows only 1 analyst Buy rating (unchanged since 2024-05-01) with no recent grade changes or ownership data. The most recent earnings event (2025-03-27, 14 trading days before decision) reported EPS actual=-869.7 vs estimate=-198 (massive miss, -4.4x), but no news corroboration of this miss is present in the packet. The 1:22 stock split on 2024-10-16 is a structural event but does not explain the 99%+ decline. SECTOR REASONING: STSS ticker maps to 'Space_Tracking_and_Surveillance_System' per Wikipedia article title. This suggests aerospace/defense/space technology sector. For such a company, expected evidence would include: regulatory filings (FAA/DoD contracts), technical announcements, partnership disclosures, or earnings guidance. The packet contains NONE of these. The absence of news, filings, and sector-specific corroboration relative to the magnitude of the price move is the bear-thesis signal. The company claim cannot be extracted because no claim is present in the packet — no press release, no 8-K, no news article. The Wikipedia pageview data (modest 14–35 daily views) suggests minimal public attention and does not support a narrative of a major catalyst event. VERDICT: The price action is real and severe, but the CATALYST ITSELF IS UNIDENTIFIED in the evidence packet. This is consistent with either (a) a genuine negative catalyst that occurred but is not yet reflected in news/filings accessible at decision time (lag), or (b) a technical/forced liquidation event unrelated to fundamental news. The structural absence of corroborating narrative evidence relative to the extreme price move is a RED FLAG for a surge_short candidate — it suggests the market is pricing in information not yet publicly disclosed or the move is driven by technical/liquidity factors rather than a concrete catalyst.
invalidation_conditions: If a news article or SEC 8-K filed between 2025-04-03 and 2025-04-10 becomes available post-decision, the catalyst classification must be revised.

If the 2025-03-27 earnings miss (-869.7 EPS vs -198 estimate) is confirmed as the primary catalyst via earnings call transcript or guidance revision, the verdict shifts from 'unidentified' to 'earnings_miss'.
If Wikipedia pageview spike on 2025-04-07 (35 views, highest in window) correlates with a specific news event or announcement, the catalyst type must be reclassified.
If subsequent 13F filings or insider Form 4 filings reveal forced selling or margin calls, the move may be reclassified as liquidity-driven rather than catalyst-driven.

HIGH: Information integrity assessment marks corroboration_status='uncorroborated' and use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false; pollution-defense layer unimplemented in v1.
MEDIUM: Analyst sentiment frozen at 1 Buy rating since 2024-05-01; no recent downgrades or coverage changes despite 99% decline.
MEDIUM: Fundamental snapshot all null; cannot assess whether the decline is justified by deteriorating fundamentals or is purely technical.
MEDIUM: Wikipedia pageviews show modest attention (14–35 daily views); no spike correlating with price collapse on 2025-04-09 (17 views, below average).
LOW: Macro regime 'Overheat / Expansionary' with strict_quality_and_valuation_caution discipline; STSS is a micro-cap with negative margins and extreme leverage, likely excluded from quality screens.
suggested_improvements: Implement news adapter with longer lookback (14+ days) to capture catalyst events that may have occurred before the 7-day window.
Wire SEC Edgar 8-K and press release adapters to capture official disclosures; current filing_confirmation.status='not_evaluated' is a critical gap.
Populate agent-derived fields (catalyst_type, catalyst_specificity_score, vague_narrative_flag) via LLM reasoning on available news/filings, even if sparse.
Implement pollution-defense layer in information_integrity_assessment to allow conditional use of low-tier sources when corroboration is absent.
Add sector-specific adapters for aerospace/defense (FAA/DoD contract databases, space industry news) to capture regulatory or partnership catalysts.
Extend corporate_calendar to include guidance revisions, analyst downgrades, and insider trading events.
Implement forced-liquidation detection via options flow, short borrow availability, or margin call signals (currently unavailable per architectural facts).
Cross-reference Wikipedia pageview spikes with news timestamps to identify correlation between attention and catalyst events.

narrative_event.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: The evidence packet structure is sound, but the v0.8.7 architecture has critical gaps for catalyst identification: (1) news_event_summary adapter (polygon_news) returns 0 rows for STSS in the 7-day window, but 20 items were dropped post-cutoff — this suggests the adapter is working but the cutoff filter is too aggressive for catalyst detection; (2) filing_confirmation is not wired, so SEC 8-K and press release data are unavailable; (3) agent-derived fields (catalyst_type, specificity_score, vague_narrative_flag) are marked 'not_evaluated' because LLM reasoning is not implemented in v1 — the agent is expected to populate these downstream, but the prompt does not provide a mechanism to do so; (4) information_integrity_assessment is a placeholder with pollution-defense layer unimplemented, so low-tier sources cannot be conditionally used; (5) alternative_data_features adapters are mostly not_connected, leaving only wikipedia_pageviews as a weak attention signal. For a surge_short candidate with extreme price deterioration, the absence of a clear catalyst is itself a signal, but the packet structure does not provide a clean way to express 'catalyst unidentified' as a distinct verdict. The current schema conflates 'no news available' with 'no catalyst exists', which are different conditions.

HIGH: Verify the 1:22 stock split on 2024-10-16 and its impact on share count and EPS calculations; confirm if the -869.7 EPS is post-split adjusted.
HIGH: Search for DoD/FAA contract announcements, partnership disclosures, or regulatory actions related to STSS or its parent company in the aerospace/defense sector.
MEDIUM: Analyze the Wikipedia pageview spike on 2025-04-07 (35 views) to identify if it correlates with a specific news event or announcement.
MEDIUM: Monitor analyst coverage for downgrades or coverage initiations post-decision to assess if the market is repricing the stock based on new information.
MEDIUM: Check options flow and short borrow availability to assess if the move is driven by technical factors (margin calls, short squeezes) rather than fundamental catalysts.

alt_data_verify.decision_or_assessment: Narrative-Price Dislocation Verification for STSS surge-short candidate
alt_data_verify.reasoning_summary: STSS exhibits a severe 52.86% 5-day decline (from $7.89 open to $4.20 close on 2025-04-09) with elevated relative volume (1.43x 20d avg). The narrative context is sparse: no news items within cutoff window, no SEC 8-K filings detected, and no GitHub activity (unmapped ticker). Wikipedia pageviews show modest baseline attention (14–35 views/day over 30-day window, peak 2025-04-07 at 35 views) with no dramatic spike correlated to the price collapse. Analyst sentiment is stale (last rating 2024-11-01: 1 Buy, 0 Hold, 0 Sell) and provides no recent catalyst. The most recent earnings (2025-03-27) showed catastrophic EPS miss (-869.7 actual vs -198 estimated), but this event is 14 days pre-decision and does not explain the 5-day acceleration. Valuation metrics are distorted by negative earnings (PE=-0.167, EV/EBITDA=-0.160). The macro regime is 'Overheat/Expansionary' with strict equity discipline, which does not support speculative shorts. Alternative-data footprint is minimal: Wikipedia pageviews are informative-absence (wired, returned data, but no surge pattern); GitHub is genuinely silent (unmapped ticker, adapter failed). No hard-to-fake corroboration (SEC filings, insider activity, regulatory action) is present. The absence of news, filings, and industry-specific alt-data relative to a 53% 5-day collapse is itself a structural signal: either the collapse is driven by technical/liquidity factors unrelated to fundamental catalyst, or the catalyst is not yet disclosed. Information integrity assessment flags low-tier-only evidence (T3=1, T4=1, T1=0, T2=0) and marks use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false due to pollution-defense layer not implemented.

SEC 8-K filing disclosing strategic partnership, acquisition, or financing
Insider buying or Form 4 filings indicating confidence
Analyst upgrade or new coverage with positive thesis
Regulatory approval or contract award announcement

alt_data_verify.schema_or_prompt_weakness_notes: The information_integrity_assessment block is marked insufficient_evidence with use_as_primary_signal_allowed=false due to unimplemented pollution-defense layer. This is a schema-level constraint, not a data quality issue. The agent cannot promote low-tier-only evidence to primary signal status without explicit pollution-defense scoring. This is appropriate fail-closed behavior but limits the ability to reason about social/community signals.

alt_data_verify.narrative_price_gap_rationale: STSS exhibits a 52.86% 5-day price collapse with elevated volume (1.43x 20d avg), yet alternative-data footprint is minimal and shows no corroborating catalyst. Wikipedia pageviews are baseline (14–35 views/day, peak 35 on 2025-04-07) with no surge pattern. No news items within cutoff, no SEC filings detected, no analyst updates since 2024-11-01. The 2025-03-27 earnings miss (-869.7 EPS vs -198 est) is 14 days old and does not explain the 5-day acceleration. The gap between price action (severe collapse) and narrative evidence (sparse/absent) is high, suggesting either technical/liquidity-driven breakdown or undisclosed catalyst. Structural absence of hard-to-fake corroboration (filings, insider activity, regulatory action) relative to the magnitude of price move is itself a bear-thesis signal for surge-short, but it is not a positive confirmation of the short thesis — it is an absence of contradiction.

Default fallback applied per alternative_data_features.adapter_selection.fallback_to_default_adapter=true.

surge_short.reasoning_summary: STSS surged from ~5.07 (prior close) to 7.89 (trigger day open) on 2025-04-10, a ~55% intraday move. However, the stock has since collapsed -52.86% in 5 days and -95.31% in 20 days, trading at 4.2 as of 2025-04-09. The surge narrative is NOT corroborated by observable evidence. (1) STRUCTURAL ABSENCE: The company's public claim (implied by the surge) should have triggered SEC 8-K disclosure, news coverage, or analyst commentary. Instead: zero news items in the 7-day window (polygon_news returned 0 rows; 20 items dropped post-cutoff, indicating no pre-cutoff coverage); no 8-K filing confirmation; analyst ratings unchanged at 1 Buy since May 2024. (2) FUNDAMENTAL DETERIORATION: Most recent earnings (2025-03-27) showed EPS of -869.7 vs estimate -198 (massive miss), revenue estimated at 14.6M (no actual reported). The company is deeply unprofitable (net_margin_pct=-11724.3%, ROE=-1.56, ROA=-1.05). (3) VALUATION DISTRESS: PE, EV/EBITDA, and PEG are all negative (company is loss-making). PB=0.179 suggests severe balance-sheet stress. (4) ALTERNATIVE DATA SILENCE: Wikipedia pageviews show no spike (baseline 15-35 views/day; no abnormal attention). GitHub unmapped (no developer footprint for a company claiming tech/space relevance). Information integrity assessment flags low-tier sources only (T3/T4; no T1/T2 primary confirmation). (5) REVERSE SPLIT HISTORY: 1:22 reverse split on 2024-10-16 is a classic distress signal, often preceding bankruptcy or restructuring. The surge appears to be momentum/short-squeeze on a distressed, unprofitable micro-cap with no verifiable catalyst. The rapid collapse (-95% in 20 days) is consistent with a momentum trap. SECTOR REASONING: If STSS is a space/defense/surveillance company (per Wikipedia article title), it should have: regulatory filings (SEC 10-K Item 1 business description), contract disclosures, government customer references, or IP/patent filings. None are present in the packet. The absence of these sector-typical signals, combined with the structural absence of news/8-K corroboration, is strong bear-thesis evidence.

If fundamental_snapshot is populated with positive revenue growth and path to profitability.
If analyst upgrades from T1/T2 sources appear with detailed thesis.
If alternative_data (GitHub, patent filings, regulatory approvals) shows real operational progress.

However, the packet does not explicitly surface the STRUCTURAL ABSENCE PATTERN as a bear-thesis signal. The surge_short agent must infer from null blocks and zero-row adapters that the absence itself is corroborating evidence. The prompt correctly instructs this (§13.6 SOFT_REASONING, universal-soft-veto principle), but a future schema revision could add an explicit 'structural_absence_score' block to quantify the mismatch between expected and observed evidence footprints.

pm.reasoning_summary: STSS exhibits catastrophic price deterioration (5d: -52.86%, 20d: -95.31%, 60d: -99.31%) with elevated relative volume (1.43x 20d avg). The surge narrative (intraday +55% on 2025-04-10) is NOT corroborated by observable evidence. STRUCTURAL ABSENCE PATTERN: (1) Zero news items in 7-day window (polygon_news returned 0 rows; 20 items dropped post-cutoff); (2) No SEC 8-K filing confirmation; (3) Analyst ratings frozen at 1 Buy since May 2024; (4) Most recent earnings (2025-03-27) showed EPS -869.7 vs estimate -198 (massive miss), but no news corroboration; (5) Wikipedia pageviews show baseline attention (14-35 views/day, peak 35 on 2025-04-07) with no surge pattern; (6) GitHub unmapped (no developer footprint); (7) Information integrity assessment flags low-tier sources only (T3=1, T4=1; no T1/T2 primary confirmation). SECTOR REASONING: STSS ticker maps to 'Space_Tracking_and_Surveillance_System' per Wikipedia article title, suggesting aerospace/defense/space technology sector. For such a company, expected evidence would include regulatory filings (FAA/DoD contracts), technical announcements, partnership disclosures, or earnings guidance. The packet contains NONE of these. The absence of news, filings, and sector-specific corroboration relative to the magnitude of the price move is the bear-thesis signal. FUNDAMENTAL DETERIORATION: Company is deeply unprofitable (net_margin_pct=-11724.3%, ROE=-1.56, ROA=-1.05). Valuation metrics are distorted by negative earnings (PE=-0.167, EV/EBITDA=-0.160). REVERSE SPLIT HISTORY: 1:22 reverse split on 2024-10-16 is a classic distress signal. The surge appears to be momentum/short-squeeze on a distressed, unprofitable micro-cap with no verifiable catalyst. The rapid collapse (-95% in 20 days) is consistent with a momentum trap. PREPONDERANCE OF EVIDENCE: The bear thesis is carried by multiple coherent dimensions: (i) extreme price deterioration with no identified catalyst (structural absence of news/filings); (ii) fundamental deterioration (massive earnings miss, negative profitability); (iii) sector-expected evidence footprint is absent (no regulatory/contract disclosures for aerospace/defense company); (iv) alternative data shows no abnormal attention (Wikipedia pageviews baseline only); (v) reverse-split distress signal; (vi) analyst sentiment frozen and stale. No single dimension is overwhelming, but the SYNTHESIS across all dimensions points strongly to a momentum trap on a distressed micro-cap. Risk agent confirms no hard-veto conditions tripped. Surge-short sleeve agent confirms position sizing at 0.005 (0.5%) is within §4.8 caps. DECISION: SHORT at 0.5% initial position per §4.8 fixed entry sizing.
